response.global_analysis: The audio contains a continuous background loop of the song 'Prisoner' by hololive English -Advent-. The lyrics phonetically match the Reference JSON snippet provided. I have transcribed the full repeating sequence of chorus and bridge segments throughout the slideshow. Timestamps are precisely aligned to the vocal onset and offset, ensuring that background vocals are captured as distinct events and that subtitle blocks remain silent during instrumental-only periods, such as the intro and the final promotional segment.
